_note: es glossary for check-glossary-consistency.py. Curated from corpus majority usage 2026-06-04. 'preferred' = canonical rendering; 'variants' = other valid target-language renderings (a file MIXING preferred+variant is flagged); 'leaked_en' = capitalized-English forms that must be translated (high-confidence MT artifacts only). keep_lowercase = English terms the field keeps, but must be lowercase.
